title: One-hundred-percent case synthesis
description: Unlock retrospective explanation only when required evidence is complete.

title: Case-file completion and persistence

title: Area case-file capstone
description: Publish the area contract and feed postgame and multi-run archives.

description: Review encounters by incident, actor, place, or chronology without changing live state.

title: Curated record versus raw session log

title: Playback integrity and no time travel
description: Prove playback cannot mutate objects, score, timers, actors, pronouns, or location.

title: Playback index persistence and size controls
description: Persist indices, deduplicate records, and bound long-session storage.

title: Transcript and playback capstone
description: Qualify representative scenes and publish hooks for expedition records.
